verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem post hæc, ut percuteret David Philisthiim, et humiliaret eos, et tolleret Geth et filias ejus de manu Philisthiim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ אַֽחֲרֵי־כֵ֔ן וַיַּ֥ךְ דָּוִ֛יד אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וַיַּכְנִיעֵ֑ם וַיִּקַּ֛ח אֶת־גַּ֥ת וּבְנֹתֶ֖יהָ מִיַּ֥ד פְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass after this, that David defeated the Philistines, and humbled them, and took away Geth, and her daughters out of the hands of the Philistines,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte löi David Philistealaiset ja vaati allensa heidät, ja hän otti Gatin kylinensä Philistealaisten kädestä.
verses.king_james: Now after this it came to pass, that David smote the Philistines, and subdued them, and took Gath and her towns out of the hand of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: percuteretque Moab, et fierent Moabitæ servi David, offerentes ei munera.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֖ךְ אֶת־מוֹאָ֑ב וַיִּהְי֤וּ מוֹאָב֙ עֲבָדִ֣ים לְדָוִ֔יד נֹשְׂאֵ֖י מִנְחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he defeated Moab, and the Moabites were made David's servants, and brought him gifts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän löi myös Moabilaiset, niin että he tulivat Davidille alamaisiksi ja veivät hänelle lahjoja.
verses.king_james: And he smote Moab; and the Moabites became David’s servants, and brought gifts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eo tempore percussit David etiam Adarezer regem Soba regionis Hemath, quando perrexit ut dilataret imperium suum usque ad flumen Euphraten.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥ךְ דָּוִ֛יד אֶת־הֲדַדְעֶ֥זֶר מֶלֶךְ־צוֹבָ֖ה חֲמָ֑תָה בְּלֶכְתּ֕וֹ לְהַצִּ֥יב יָד֖וֹ בִּֽנְהַר־פְּרָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: At that time David defeated also Adarezer king of Soba of the land of Hemath, when he went to extend his dominions as far as the river Euphrates.
verses.finnish_biblia: David löi myös Hadareserin Zoban kuninkaan Hamatissa, silloin kuin hän meni asettamaan sotajoukkoansa Phratin veden tykö.
verses.king_james: And David smote Hadarezer king of Zobah unto Hamath, as he went to stablish his dominion by the river Euphrates.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cepit ergo David mille quadrigas ejus, et septem millia equitum, ac viginti millia virorum peditum, subnervavitque omnes equos curruum, exceptis centum quadrigis, quas reservavit sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּלְכֹּד֩ דָּוִ֨יד מִמֶּ֜נּוּ אֶ֣לֶף רֶ֗כֶב וְשִׁבְעַ֤ת אֲלָפִים֙ פָּרָשִׁ֔ים וְעֶשְׂרִ֥ים אֶ֖לֶף אִ֣ישׁ רַגְלִ֑י וַיְעַקֵּ֤ר דָּוִיד֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הָרֶ֔כֶב וַיּוֹתֵ֥ר מִמֶּ֖נּוּ מֵ֥אָה רָֽכֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David took from him a thousand chariots, and seven thousand horsemen, and twenty thousand footmen, and he houghed all the chariot horses, only a hundred chariots, which he reserved for himself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David voitti häneltä tuhannen vaunua, seitsemäntuhatta hevosmiestä ja kaksikymmentätuhatta jalkamiestä. Ja David raiskasi kaikki vaunut, ja piti heistä tallella sata vaunua.
verses.king_james: And David took from him a thousand chariots, and seven thousand horsemen, and twenty thousand footmen: David also houghed all the chariot horses, but reserved of them an hundred chariots.

verses.latin_vulgate: Supervenit autem et Syrus Damascenus, ut auxilium præberet Adarezer regi Soba : sed et hujus percussit David viginti duo millia virorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹא֙ אֲרַ֣ם דַּרְמֶ֔שֶׂק לַעְז֕וֹר לַהֲדַדְעֶ֖זֶר מֶ֣לֶךְ צוֹבָ֑ה וַיַּ֤ךְ דָּוִיד֙ בַּאֲרָ֔ם עֶשְׂרִֽים־וּשְׁנַ֥יִם אֶ֖לֶף אִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Syrians of Damascus came also to help Adarezer king of Soba: and David slew of them likewise two and twenty thousand men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Syrialaiset Damaskusta tulivat Hadareserin Zoban kuninkaan apuun; mutta David löi Syrialaisista kaksikolmattakymmentä tuhatta miestä.
verses.king_james: And when the Syrians of Damascus came to help Hadarezer king of Zobah, David slew of the Syrians two and twenty thousand men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuit milites in Damasco, ut Syria quoque serviret sibi, et offerret munera. Adjuvitque eum Dominus in cunctis ad quæ perrexerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שֶׂם דָּוִיד֙ בַּאֲרַ֣ם דַּרְמֶ֔שֶׂק וַיְהִ֤י אֲרָם֙ לְדָוִ֔יד עֲבָדִ֖ים נֹשְׂאֵ֣י מִנְחָ֑ה וַיּ֤וֹשַׁע יְהֹוָה֙ לְדָוִ֔יד בְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he put a garrison in Damascus, that Syria also should serve him, and bring gifts. And the Lord assisted him in all things to which he went.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David asetti vartiat Syrian Damaskuun, niin että Syrialaiset tulivat Davidin alamaisiksi ja veivät hänelle lahjoja; sillä Herra autti Davidia, kuhunka ikänä hän vaelsi.
verses.king_james: Then David put garrisons in Syria–damascus; and the Syrians became David’s servants, and brought gifts. Thus the Lord preserved David whithersoever he went.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit quoque David pharetras aureas, quas habuerant servi Adarezer, et attulit eas in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח דָּוִ֗יד אֵ֚ת שִׁלְטֵ֣י הַזָּהָ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָי֔וּ עַ֖ל עַבְדֵ֣י הֲדַדְעָ֑זֶר וַיְבִיאֵ֖ם יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David took the golden quivers which the servants of Adarezer had, and he brought them to Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David otti ne kultaiset kilvet, jotka olivat Hadareserin palvelioilla, ja vei ne Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And David took the shields of gold that were on the servants of Hadarezer, and brought them to Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Necnon de Thebath et Chun urbibus Adarezer æris plurimum, de quo fecit Salomon mare æneum, et columnas, et vasa ænea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִטִּבְחַ֤ת וּמִכּוּן֙ עָרֵ֣י הֲדַדְעֶ֔זֶר לָקַ֥ח דָּוִ֛יד נְחֹ֖שֶׁת רַבָּ֣ה מְאֹ֑ד בָּ֣הּ ׀ עָשָׂ֣ה שְׁלֹמֹ֗ה אֶת־יָ֤ם הַנְּחֹ֙שֶׁת֙ וְאֶת־הָֽעַמּוּדִ֔ים וְאֵ֖ת כְּלֵ֥י הַנְּחֹֽשֶׁת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Likewise out of Thebath and Chun, cities of Adarezer, he brought very much brass, of which Solomon made the brazen sea, and the pillars, and the vessels of brass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Otti myös David Hadareserin kaupungeista Tibehatista ja Kunista juuri paljon vaskea, josta Salomo teki vaskimeren, patsaat ja vaskiastioita.
verses.king_james: Likewise from Tibhath, and from Chun, cities of Hadarezer, brought David very much brass, wherewith Solomon made the brasen sea, and the pillars, and the vessels of brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum audisset Thou rex Hemath, percussisse videlicet David omnem exercitum Adarezer regis Soba,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֕ע תֹּ֖עוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ חֲמָ֑ת כִּ֚י הִכָּ֣ה דָוִ֔יד אֶת־כׇּל־חֵ֖יל הֲדַדְעֶ֥זֶר מֶלֶךְ־צוֹבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when Thou king of Hemath heard that David had defeated all the army of Adarezer king of Soba,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Togu Hematin kuningas kuuli Davidin lyöneen kaiken Hadareserin Zoban kuninkaan sotajoukon,
verses.king_james: Now when Tou king of Hamath heard how David had smitten all the host of Hadarezer king of Zobah;

verses.latin_vulgate: misit Adoram filium suum ad regem David, ut postularet ab eo pacem, et congratularetur ei quod percussisset et expugnasset Adarezer : adversarius quippe erat Thou Adarezer.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח אֶת־הֲדֽוֹרָם־בְּנ֣וֹ אֶל־הַמֶּֽלֶךְ־דָּ֠וִ֠יד (לשאול) [לִשְׁאׇל־]ל֨וֹ לְשָׁל֜וֹם וּֽלְבָרְכ֗וֹ עַל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִלְחַ֤ם בַּהֲדַדְעֶ֙זֶר֙ וַיַּכֵּ֔הוּ כִּי־אִ֛ישׁ מִלְחֲמ֥וֹת תֹּ֖עוּ הָיָ֣ה הֲדַדְעָ֑זֶר וְכֹ֗ל כְּלֵ֛י זָהָ֥ב וָכֶ֖סֶף וּנְחֹֽשֶׁת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sent Adoram his son to king David to desire peace of him, and to congratulate him that he had defeated and overthrown Adarezer: for Thou was an enemy to Adarezer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetti hän poikansa Hadoramin kuningas Davidin tykö, tervehtimään häntä ystävällisesti ja siunaamaan häntä, että hän Hadareserin kanssa sotinut ja hänen lyönyt oli; sillä Togulla oli sota Hadareserin kanssa: niin myös kaikellaisia kultaisia, hopiaisia ja vaskisia asioita (lähetti hän).
verses.king_james: He sent Hadoram his son to king David, to enquire of his welfare, and to congratulate him, because he had fought against Hadarezer, and smitten him; (for Hadarezer had war with Tou;) and with him all manner of vessels of gold and silver and brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et omnia vasa aurea, et argentea, et ænea consecravit David rex Domino, cum argento et auro quod tulerat ex universis gentibus, tam de Idumæa, et Moab, et filiis Ammon, quam de Philisthiim et Amalec.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אֹתָ֗ם הִקְדִּ֞ישׁ הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ דָּוִיד֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה עִם־הַכֶּ֙סֶף֙ וְהַזָּהָ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָשָׂ֖א מִכׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֑ם מֵאֱד֤וֹם וּמִמּוֹאָב֙ וּמִבְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֔וֹן וּמִפְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וּמֵעֲמָלֵֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the vessels of gold, and silver and brass king David consecrated to the Lord, with the silver and gold which he had taken from all the nations, as well from Edom, and from Moab, and from the sons of Ammon, as from the Philistines, and from Amalec.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas David pyhitti ne Herralle sen sen hopian ja kullan kanssa, jonka hän oli ottanut kaikilta pakanoilta, Edomilaisilta, Moabilaisilta, Ammonin lapsilta, Philistealaisilta ja Amalekilaisilta.
verses.king_james: Them also king David dedicated unto the Lord, with the silver and the gold that he brought from all these nations; from Edom, and from Moab, and from the children of Ammon, and from the Philistines, and from Amalek.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abisai vero filius Sarviæ percussit Edom in valle Salinarum, decem et octo millia :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַבְשַׁ֣י בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֗ה הִכָּ֤ה אֶת־אֱדוֹם֙ בְּגֵ֣יא הַמֶּ֔לַח שְׁמוֹנָ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר אָֽלֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abisai the son of Sarvia slew of the Edomites in the vale of the saltpits, eighteen thousand:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abisai Zerujan poika löi Suolalaaksossa Edomilaisista kahdeksantoistakymmentä tuhatta,
verses.king_james: Moreover Abishai the son of Zeruiah slew of the Edomites in the valley of salt eighteen thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: et constituit in Edom præsidium, ut serviret Idumæa David : salvavitque Dominus David in cunctis ad quæ perrexerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שֶׂם בֶּאֱדוֹם֙ נְצִיבִ֔ים וַיִּהְי֥וּ כׇל־אֱד֖וֹם עֲבָדִ֣ים לְדָוִ֑יד וַיּ֤וֹשַׁע יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־דָּוִ֔יד בְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he put a garrison in Edom, that Edom should serve David: and the Lord preserved David in all things to which he went.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja asetti vartiat Edomiin, niin että kaikki Edomilaiset olivat Davidin alamaiset; sillä Herra autti Davidia, kuhunka ikänä hän vaelsi.
verses.king_james: And he put garrisons in Edom; and all the Edomites became David’s servants. Thus the Lord preserved David whithersoever he went.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regnavit ergo David super universum Israël, et faciebat judicium atque justitiam cuncto populo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ דָּוִ֖יד עַל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיְהִ֗י עֹשֶׂ֛ה מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּצְדָקָ֖ה לְכׇל־עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So David reigned over all Israel, and executed judgment and justice among all his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin hallitsi David kaiken Israelin, ja hän teki oikeuden ja hurskauden kaikelle kansallensa.
verses.king_james: So David reigned over all Israel, and executed judgment and justice among all his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Joab filius Sarviæ erat super exercitum, et Josaphat filius Ahilud a commentariis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹאָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֖ה עַל־הַצָּבָ֑א וִיהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט בֶּן־אֲחִיל֖וּד מַזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joab the son of Sarvia was over the army, and Josaphat the son of Ahilud recorder.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joab Zerujan poika oli sotajoukon päällä, Josaphat Ahiludin poika oli kansleri.
verses.king_james: And Joab the son of Zeruiah was over the host; and Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud, recorder.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sadoc autem filius Achitob, et Ahimelech filius Abiathar, sacerdotes : et Susa, scriba :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצָד֧וֹק בֶּן־אֲחִיט֛וּב וַאֲבִימֶ֥לֶךְ בֶּן־אֶבְיָתָ֖ר כֹּהֲנִ֑ים וְשַׁוְשָׁ֖א סוֹפֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sadoc the son of Achitob, and Achimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests: and Susa, scribe.
verses.finnish_biblia: Zadok Ahitobin poika ja Abimelek Abjatarin poika olivat papit, Sausa oli kirjoittaja.
verses.king_james: And Zadok the son of Ahitub, and Abimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests; and Shavsha was scribe;

verses.latin_vulgate: Banaias quoque filius Jojadæ super legiones Cerethi et Phelethi : porro filii David, primi ad manum regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָיָ֙הוּ֙ בֶּן־יְה֣וֹיָדָ֔ע עַל־הַכְּרֵתִ֖י וְהַפְּלֵתִ֑י וּבְנֵי־דָוִ֥יד הָרִֽאשֹׁנִ֖ים לְיַ֥ד הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Banaias the son of Joiada was over the bands of the Cerethi, and the Phelethi: and the sons of David were chief about the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Benaja Jojadan poika oli Kretin ja Pletin päällä. Ja Davidin pojat olivat ensimäiset kuninkaan käsillä.
verses.king_james: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites; and the sons of David were chief about the king.
